utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , you forget how many great songs Heart had .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know , Barracuda was the first song I learned to play on the keyboard .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So , you heard it , you repeated it , so that must mean you wrote it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , you guys , with this joke . I gotta say , I know I cracked up , but I am not even sure I got it .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am not even sure I got it .
5_I am not even sure I got it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And monkeys can not write out prescriptions .

emotion_cause.span: 9_And monkeys can not write out prescriptions .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You are not allowed to laugh at my joke .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Your joke ? Well , I think the Hef would disagree , which is why he sent me a check for $ 100 .

emotion_cause.span: 10_You are not allowed to laugh at my joke .
